ns0:entry.ns0:title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
Language: shell
Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

A collection of AI agent skills useful for projects using Kotlin language

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: addyosmani/agent-skills

URL: https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills

Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: awslabs/agent-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/awslabs/agent-plugins
Language: shell
Agent Plugins for AWS equip AI coding agents with the skills to help you architect, deploy, and operate on AWS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-cli
Language: shell
GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kholia/OSX-KVM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kholia/OSX-KVM
Language: shell
Run macOS on QEMU/KVM. With OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma support now! Only commercial (paid) support is available now to avoid spammy issues. No Mac system is required.

URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
